اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِكِتَابِكَ الْمُنْزَلِ وَ مَا فِيهِ
وَ فِيهِ اسْمُكَ الْأَكْبَرُ وَ أَسْمَاؤُكَ الْحُسْنَى وَ مَا يُخَافُ وَ يُرْجَى أَنْ تَجْعَلَنِي مِنْ عُتَقَائِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ
slides.transliteration:
Alaahumma inni asaloka be kitaabekal munzale Wa maa feeh,
wa feehismokal akbaro wa asmaakal husnaa, wa maa yokhaafo Wa yurjaa an taj-alani min otaqaaeka minan-Naar
slides.english:
O Allah I beseech Thee in the name of Thy revealed Book and that which is in it,
and Thy Great Name and Thy (Other) beautiful names are in it, and in it there is that which warns and gives hope to include me among those who have been set free from the Hellfire.

slides.title: Place the Qur'an on Your Head
slides.instruction: Take the Holy Qur'an and hold it on your head and recite:
slides.arabic:
اللّهُمّ بِحَقّ هذَا القُرْآنِ
وَبِحَقّ مَنْ أَرْسَلْتَهُ بِهِ
وَبِحَقّ كُلّ مُؤْمِنٍ مَدَحْتَهُ فِيهِ
وَبِحَقّكَ عَلَيْهِمْ
فَال أَحَدَ أَعْرَفُ بِحَقّكَ مِنْكَ.
slides.transliteration:
Allaahumma be haqqe haazal Qur'an
we be haqqe man arsaltahoo beh
Wa be haqqe kulle momenin madahtahoo feeh
we be haqqeka alaihim
fa-laa ahada a'arafo be haqqeka mink
slides.english:
O Allah: for the sake of this (Holy) Qur'an,
and for the sake of that person through whom You sent it,
and for the sake of those believers who have been praised therein,
and in the name of Your obligation to them,
no one is aware of Your obligation more than You

slides.title: Invocation of Allah
slides.instruction: Keep the Quran on your heads and recite the following:
slides.arabic: بِكَ يَا اللّهُ،
slides.transliteration: bika yaallahu
slides.english: For Your sake, O Allah,

slides.title: Invocation through the Prophet
slides.arabic: بِمُحَمّدٍ،
slides.transliteration: bi-muhammadin
slides.english: for the sake of Muhammad,

slides.title: Invocation through Imam Ali
slides.arabic: بِعَلِيّ،
slides.transliteration: bi-`aliyyin
slides.english: for the sake of `Ali,

slides.title: Invocation through Sayyida Fatima
slides.arabic: بِفَاطِمَةَ،
slides.transliteration: bi-fatimata
slides.english: for the sake of Fatimah,

slides.title: Invocation through Imam Hasan
slides.arabic: بِالحَسَنِ،
slides.transliteration: bilhasani
slides.english: for the sake of Hasan,

slides.title: Invocation through Imam Husayn
slides.arabic: بِالحُسَيْنِ،
slides.transliteration: bilhusayni
slides.english: for the sake of Husayn,

slides.title: Invocation through Imam Ali ibn Husayn
slides.arabic: بِعَلِيّ بْنِ الحُسَيْنِ،
slides.transliteration: bi-`aliyyi bni alhusayni
slides.english: for the sake of `Ali ibn Husayn,

slides.title: Invocation through Imam Muhammad ibn Ali
slides.arabic: بِمُحَمّدِ بْنِ عَلِيّ،
slides.transliteration: bi-muhammadi bni `aliyyin
slides.english: for the sake of Muhammad ibn `Ali,

slides.title: Invocation through Imam Ja'far ibn Muhammad
slides.arabic: بِجَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمّدٍ،
slides.transliteration: bi-ja`fari bni muhammadin
slides.english: for the sake of Ja`far ibn Muhammad,

slides.title: Invocation through Imam Musa ibn Ja'far
slides.arabic: بِمُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ،
slides.transliteration: bi-musa bni ja`farin
slides.english: for the sake of Musa ibn Jafar,

slides.title: Invocation through Imam Ali ibn Musa
slides.arabic: بِعَلِيّ بْنِ مُوسَى،
slides.transliteration: bi-`aliyyi bni musa
slides.english: for the sake of `Ali ibn Musa,

slides.title: Invocation through Imam Muhammad ibn Ali
slides.arabic: بِمُحَمّدِ بْنِ عَلِيّ،
slides.transliteration: bi-muhammadi bni `aliyyin
slides.english: for the sake of Muhammad ibn `Ali,

slides.title: Invocation through Imam Ali ibn Muhammad
slides.arabic: بِعَلِيّ بْنِ مُحَمّدٍ،
slides.transliteration: bi-`aliyyi bni muhammadin
slides.english: for the sake of `Ali ibn Muhammad,

slides.title: Invocation through Imam Hasan ibn Ali
slides.arabic: بِالحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيّ،
slides.transliteration: bilhasani bni `aliyyin
slides.english: for the sake of Hasan ibn `Ali,

slides.title: Invocation through al-Hujjah
slides.arabic: بِالحُجّةِ،
slides.transliteration: bilhujjati
slides.english: for the sake of al-Hujjah.

slides.title: Final Dua
slides.instruction: In the end one should then pray to Almighty Allah to fulfil one’s desires.

slides.title: Sajdah Shukr
slides.arabic: أَظْلَمَ الذَّنْبُ مِنْ عَبْدِكَ، فَلْيُحْسِنِ العَفْوُ مِنْ عِندِكَ.
slides.transliteration: Azomad dhambo min abdika, fal yohsanal afwu min indika
slides.english: "The sin has become greater from Your servant, so let forgiveness from You be perfected.

slides.title: Ask for Health and Well-Being
slides.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ العَفْوَ وَالعَافِيَةَ، المُعَافَاةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ.
slides.transliteration: Allhumma Inni Asaloka Al Afwa wal Afiyata , walmuafata fid-dunya wal akhira
slides.english: "O Allah, I ask You for pardon and well-being, and complete protection in this world and the Hereafter."

slides.title: Bidding Farewell
slides.instruction: At the end of the night, resort to the Ma'sumin (a). With a humble and broken heart submit your deeds and worship to them and ask them to intercede with Allah for their acceptance.

slides.title: Recite Qur'an 2:127
slides.arabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّآ ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيم
slides.transliteration: Rabbanaa taqabbal minnaa innaka Antas Samee'ul Aleem
slides.english: Our Lord, accept it from us. Indeed You are the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

slides.title: Shukran Lillah
slides.instruction: Finally say “Shukran Lillah” and thank Allah (swt) for granting the tawfiq to perform the a'maal of the night.
